creator: marquis@roble.com
text:
> PR description says it's update to 1.8.3, however the port is at 1.8.3
> already. Is it a mistake?

Hi Roman,

Yes and no, it's not an update to 1.8.4 but it is an update to the 1.8.3
branch.  Apologies for the confusion, I left the porttools description as-is
assuming it was convention.  Feel free to change it.

Roger
